perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a lion-themed hood, yellow top, and white high-platform boots grips a vertical metallic pole in a studio. The lighting shifts between pink and green. (2) She performs a variety of acrobatic spins, climbs, and inversions on the pole. The video frequently cuts to a split-screen view showing two other women reacting with surprised and amused expressions. (3) The dancer concludes with several stationary poses on the pole, including a seated pose and an extended leg hold, while the studio lighting transitions through orange and purple hues.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced pop music with a female singer begins, featuring a rhythmic electronic beat. (2) The song continues with lyrics mentioning 'soda pop'. Near the end, an additional layer of female dialogue is heard saying, 'They're demons, I mean divas, obviously demons'. (3) The music maintains its high energy and tempo until the end, dominated by electronic synthesizers and percussion.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) PANPOLE STUDIO: Functional Text, identifying the location of the performance, neutral tone. (2) GAP: Functional Text, brand label on a participant's hat, neutral tone. (3) Heart icons and sparkles: Decorative Text, appearing as overlays during the final poses to enhance the aesthetic appeal, playful and affectionate tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Skill Demo with Reaction shots -> Final Poses

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main dancer, 2 women in reaction split-screen
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman wearing a brown fuzzy lion hood with a tail, a yellow crop top, black textured leggings, and white lace-up platform boots.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor dance studio featuring a vertical pole, wooden floors, and the 'PANPOLE STUDIO' logo on the wall. The environment is illuminated by color-changing stage lights.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Intense studio lights with shifting colors

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is designed to showcase high-level pole dancing athleticism and artistry while maintaining a lighthearted and humorous tone through the use of a lion costume. It utilizes a popular reaction-style format to increase social media engagement and promote the 'PANPOLE STUDIO' brand.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The studio logo 'PANPOLE STUDIO' is clearly visible and centered in the background throughout the entire performance.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively combines professional-grade athletic performance with comedic elements and social media editing trends.
